positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a lone, majestic mountain silhouette at sunset. The composition should be perfectly centered, featuring sharply defined layers of rolling hills and stylized mountain peaks. The sky should use deep gradients of fiery orange, deep indigo, and lavender, achieving maximum contrast against the dark, clean silhouettes of the landscape. Incorporate minimalist celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized star clusters. The style should be a blend of contemporary vector art, pop art poster design, and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print texture, ensuring strong outlines and flat color areas suitable for high-contrast screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, graphic novel aesthetic, high saturation, symmetrical composition.
